title: Timeless Classic - Never Late!
description: Beautifully crafted, with a face that shows no emotions but tells all. It has hands that move but never touch. A perfect addition to your wall or wrist. Find yourself in perfect sync with time.

title: A Piece of Faerie Light
description: Once held aloft in trembling hands, now seeking a hearth to call home. It bends but does not break, whispers but does not speak. From twilight dances on the moors to quiet nights of contemplation, it glows softly still. A poet's muse in glass and wick.

title: Missing: Keeper of Secrets
description: Small and bound, I hold treasures untold. My pages whisper stories, but my voice is silent. Last seen near a cozy armchair. If found, your thoughts may already be inside.

title: For Trade: A Piece of Me
description: I grow shorter as I serve you, yet I bring light in the darkest of nights. My flame dances but is never free. Trade me for a spark of inspiration.

title: Seeker of Shadows
description: A companion once told me: 'The world breaks everyone, and afterward, many are strong at the broken places.' I search for what is unseen, the echo that remains after the laugh, the word unsaid after the poem ends. If you understand the silence that follows applause, write to me.

title: Lost: A Thought at Sea
description: On a misty morning, where the waves meet the cliffs, I let it slip into the spray. It is round and small, a wordless song sung by seabirds. If it rolls to your feet, be kind: return it to the one who dreams too much.

title: For Let: The Second Door
description: At the end of a quiet lane, where the roses grow wild, you will find it. It is not the first door; it is the second. The hinges creak like an old fiddle, and the windows sing in the rain. The walls hold stories. If you listen, they will tell them to you.

title: Guides to the Forgotten
description: For those who have lost the thread, we find the weave. For those who seek but cannot name, we hold the lantern high. No map is too old, no road too dark. Payment in silver coin or a promise made under moonlight.

title: The Hollow Drum Awaits
description: Do you hear it? The echo that lives between breaths, the heartbeat of the hill where the heather grows? I do not seek, nor do I chase. I wait, patient as a stone under the stars. If you carry a song that has no words, let it rest here awhile.

title: Wanted: Keeper of Words
description: They must be sorted like beads on a string, clear and bright as the morning frost. A careful hand and a steady heart required. Some words bite; others sing. Seekers of fortune need not apply. The role suits those who live in libraries and dream in starlight.

title: Vacation Shed
description: Shady shed rental for sulking.

title: Vacation Hut
description: Hidden hut rental for secret stuff.

title: Vacation Cabin
description: Secluded cabin rental for weekend getaways.

title: The Portrait I Never Painted
description: Time wears all masks, but mine remains untouched. I seek the gaze that knows the difference between shadow and light. If you believe beauty is a question, not an answer, let us inquire together.

title: A Mirror Unbroken
description: Gilded frame, perfect reflection. It sees all, yet speaks no lies. Many have stood before it, yet none have truly seen. If you wish to purchase wisdom for your walls, it may yet be yours—for the right price.

title: Epigrams for Hire
description: Words, like people, have faces. I craft them with care, turning truth into riddles and riddles into truths. Perfect for speeches, letters, or confessions you’ll never send. Payment: one dazzling secret for every borrowed phrase.

title: Lost: A Cynic's Soul
description: It has been missing since I learned the price of everything and the value of nothing. If found, do not keep it for yourself—it can only haunt one at a time.

title: For Let: The Room of Unspoken Truths
description: A quiet space where even the furniture has opinions. Every chair a throne, every corner a stage. Suitable for those who prefer beauty over comfort and eloquence over silence. Ideal for poets, dreamers, and tragedians.

title: Construction Worker
description: Looking for experienced workers. Competitive pay.

title: Antique Sofa
description: Vintage style, recently reupholstered. Perfect for a living room.

title: Lost: The Whisper of the Wind
description: It was last heard among the reeds of a quiet bog, a tune older than stone, lighter than breath. They say it belongs to no one, yet I feel its absence keenly. If it brushes past your ear, return it to the silence that seeks it.

title: Roommate Needed
description: Looking for a roommate for a 2-bedroom apartment.

title: An Endless Cup
description: Crafted from porcelain that never cools, it holds both sorrow and joy. It’s said those who drink from it never thirst, though some forget how to swallow. An heirloom passed down through shadowed hands. Now seeking a bearer who knows its worth.

title: We Mend What Cannot Be Broken
description: A cracked heart? A shattered dream? An oath undone? We stitch with golden thread, binding what was lost into something whole once more. Payment: a memory worth remembering.

title: For Let: A Room of Forgotten Laughter
description: The walls hum faintly, as if remembering a joke long forgotten. The floor creaks not from age but from applause. The air itself is thick with stories yet untold. Perfect for one who needs the company of echoes.

title: Lost: A Shadow Cast by Light
description: It slipped away at twilight, lingering behind as I crossed a gate that wasn't there. It is thin, fleeting, but always follows. If you find it stretching across your path, send it home.

title: Companion to the Fog
description: I wander the hills where no path can guide me, yet I am never lost. I follow a song heard by no one else, carried on the breath of dusk. If you too seek what cannot be found, walk beside me. We may find the answer, or perhaps the question itself.

title: Looking for a Bike
description: Seeking a used road bike in good condition.

title: Friendship Wanted
description: Looking for a hiking partner. Enjoy the great outdoors.

title: Cat Adoption
description: Sweet tabby cat, 2 years old, spayed and vaccinated.

title: Franchise Available
description: Own your own coffee shop. Franchise opportunities open.

title: Electric Scooter
description: Eco-friendly and barely used. Includes charger.

title: Golden Retriever Puppies
description: Adorable, playful puppies looking for a loving home.

title: Neighborhood Cleanup
description: Join us to beautify our streets this Saturday.

title: Book Collection
description: Selling a variety of novels and rare editions.

title: For Sale: A Question with No Answer
description: It has circled the lips of philosophers and haunted the dreams of kings. You cannot own it, but you may hold it for a while. Careful—some who keep it too long never find their way back.

title: Kitchen Appliances
description: Toaster and blender combo. Excellent condition.

title: Language Exchange
description: Want to practice Spanish in exchange for English lessons.

title: Office Assistant
description: Part-time position in a friendly office environment.

title: Used Sedan
description: 2016 Toyota Corolla. Low mileage and great condition.

title: Vintage Camera
description: Classic film camera, great for collectors.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Freelance opportunity for a creative individual.

title: Tech Startup Investment
description: Seeking partners for innovative tech project.

title: Math Tutoring
description: Experienced tutor available for all grade levels.

title: Plumbing Services
description: Reliable plumber available for all types of repairs.

title: Music Lessons
description: Piano and guitar lessons for beginners and intermediates.

title: Local Farmers Market
description: Fresh produce and homemade goods every weekend.

title: Harley Davidson Bike
description: Classic motorcycle, fully serviced, ready to ride.

title: Lawn Mowing
description: Affordable lawn care services for all yard sizes.

title: Found Bracelet
description: Silver bracelet with engravings. Found in the park.

title: Lost Cat
description: Black cat with green eyes. Last seen near Main Street.

title: 2-Bedroom Apartment
description: Modern apartment in city center. Close to public transport.

title: Studio Apartment
description: Affordable studio near downtown. Utilities included.

title: Wedding Invitation
description: You are warmly invited to our special day.

title: Cozy Cottage
description: Charming 3-bedroom cottage with a large garden.

title: Charity Bake Sale
description: Come support our community with delicious treats!
